cards.title: AI Data Analytics: Enhance Your Data Analysis | Microsoft AI
tldr: AI data analytics significantly enhances the speed and depth of organizational data analysis.

tldr: **MSPs can leverage AI-powered risk management to enhance cybersecurity posture and achieve operational scaling.**

tldr: **AI is revolutionizing construction estimating, enhancing takeoff accuracy and significantly reducing manual effort.**
AI platforms like Kamai automate measurements, extract structured data from blueprints, and provide insights.
This enables contractors to bid faster and smarter, making confident, data-driven decisions on projects.

tldr: **Product managers leverage AI to conduct over 30 customer interviews monthly, significantly boosting insight gathering.**
The Rovo Agent AI automates interview scheduling, execution, and analysis, streamlining the entire feedback process.
This approach allows product teams to rapidly validate ideas and make data-driven decisions based on extensive customer feedback.
